title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER SALEM REGIONAL OFFICE GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal counseling and/or representation for low-income individuals who need assistance with routine legal matters (civil, non-criminal), usually regarding housing, public benefits, family, or elder law. Offers a tenant advocate hotline. Some locations may offer additional services. 280 Liberty Street Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Low-income individuals who are at or below 125% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday 9am-noon (503) 485-0696 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 485-0696 Main phone Main phone (503) 485-0696 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 9am-4pm, Thursday 1pm-4pm, Friday 9am-noon Services: General Legal Aid Tenant Rights Information/Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER SALEM REGIONAL OFFICE
